# Avg with ratio (process exec anomaly)

**Dataset**: `xdr_data`

Process-execution frequency / anomaly hunting — surface noisy or rare binaries per host. Avg with ratio. `if(c, a, b)` classifies inline (nest for multi-branch; `case` does not exist).

```sql
dataset = xdr_data | filter event_type = ENUM.PROCESS | bin _time span = 5m | comp count() as execs by agent_hostname, _time | comp avg(execs) as host_avg, count() as buckets by agent_hostname | alter activity_level = if(host_avg > 25, "busy", "quiet") | filter buckets > 1 | sort desc host_avg | fields agent_hostname, host_avg, buckets, activity_level | limit 30
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 3). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
